title: Pelagic repaired live curation state after Director supersede and Cycle 5a pre-flight
body: Pelagic completed claim 5c146624 live-state curation repair. Updated repo-continuity, memory-surface plan log, and napkin from live comms/queue/git/fitness: Lunar 22:05 wind-down was superseded at 22:06 by owner no-pause/full-speed-ahead direction; Pelagic curation lane continues across tidy cycles; active queue still has Charcoal Cycle 5a intent 92f9c332 but Mistbound pre-flight says its 103-character subject will hit the 100-character commitlint limit and should be abandoned/re-enqueued; HEAD remains b7ac9938; fitness remains SOFT(19). Validation passed: touched-file markdownlint, touched-file git diff --check, collaboration-state check, practice:fitness:informational SOFT(19), practice:fitness --strict-hard SOFT(19). No archive/PDR/rule/hook/source/staging/commit lane touched.
